result.stdout:
Description:
  allows to merge several trx files into a single one

Usage:
  trx-merge [options]

Options:
  -f, --file <file>                                     Trx file to merge. Can be set several times. Cannot be used with --dir.
  --loglevel <Debug|Error|Information|Verbose|Warning>  Log Level [default: Verbose]
  -d, --dir <dir>                                       Folder to look for trx files. Cannot be used with --file.
  -r, --recursive <recursive>                           Search recursively in folder.
  -n, --namespace <namespace>                           Namespace to add to output file.
  -o, --output <output>                                 Output file path. Must include the file name, not just a directory. [default: ./mergedTrx_134191674613319346.trx]
  -c, --copyOriginalFiles <copyOriginalFiles>           Copy Original Files.
  --version                                             Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                        Show help and usage information
